caption: In an indoor setting with light-colored walls, two people are seen from the waist up, both wearing protective face masks. A man on the left wears a black t-shirt with a circular logo on the chest and has a tattoo on his left forearm; he sits in a chair, looking toward a woman on the right. The woman wears a dark navy blue collared shirt and a grey mask, facing the man. A third person is partially visible behind the woman, wearing a dark blue uniform. On the wall behind the man is a white dispenser. A purple graphic of a person and a pink box with the text "Day 5" appear in the bottom left corner, while the text "Sim Week" is visible in the bottom right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, shifting his gaze and slightly moving his hands, while the woman remains relatively still, maintaining her profile as she interacts with him.
